category_title: Students exhibiting physical aggression, bullying, and disrespect toward authority
scenario_title: Disrespect and disengagement during EFL communicative activities in an overcrowded classroom
minimal_context: The student is supposed to be sitting down to listen to instructions for an English communicative activity in a large, hot classroom.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Everyone, please settle down and take your seats so we can listen to the instructions for our English communicative activity.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Standing by the window instead of sitting) I don't want to do this right now. The ceiling fans don't work and it was very hot in here.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We need to practice expressing our ideas in English today. Please go to your seat.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don't understand how to say anything in English anyway. I'm not participating.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just try your best to listen to the instructions first.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Yelling across the room to another student) I'm not doing it, viejo! You can't make us sit down and listen in this heat!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Everyone, please settle down and take your seats so we can listen to the instructions for our English communicative activity.

STUDENT: (Standing by the window instead of sitting) I don't want to do this right now. The ceiling fans don't work and it was very hot in here.

TUTOR: We need to practice expressing our ideas in English today. Please go to your seat.

STUDENT: I don't understand how to say anything in English anyway. I'm not participating.

TUTOR: Just try your best to listen to the instructions first.

STUDENT: (Yelling across the room to another student) I'm not doing it, viejo! You can't make us sit down and listen in this heat!
